constructors.name: RecordableCommand()
constructors.summary: Constructs an instance of RecordableCommand derived class. This constructor is made protected to indicate that the class instance can only be instantiated through a derived class.

constructors.name: RecordableCommand(string)
constructors.summary: Constructs an instance of RecordableCommand derived class, assigning a new tag to it.

params.name: tag
params.doc: A string tag to be assigned to the command. This parameter can be any string, even an empty one. However, it should not be null. A null "tag" parameter causes the ArgumentNullException to be thrown.

methods.name: ExecuteCore(Dynamo.Models.DynamoModel)
methods.summary: Derived classes must implement this method to perform the actual command execution. A typical implementation of this method involves calling a corresponding method on DynamoModel by passing itself as the only argument.

params.name: dynamoModel
params.doc: The DynamoModel object on which this command should be executed.

methods.name: SerializeCore(System.Xml.XmlElement)
methods.summary: Derived classes must implement this method to serialize all relevant information into the XmlElement supplied to it. Typically the method is a direct mirror of DeserializeCore.

params.name: element
params.doc: All arguments that are required for this command are written into this XmlElement. The information written here must be exactly what DeserializeCore method expects.
